content.cn_text: 关于公园。
content.en_text: About the park.

content.cn_text: 拜伦国家公园占地7,000英亩，横跨三个州，旨在保护该地区最壮观的风景名胜。
content.en_text: Covering seven thousand acres of land and spanning across three states, Byron National Park was established to protect the area's most spectacular scenic values.

content.cn_text: 它具有独特的地质特征，自然历史和原生动植物，是娱乐和研究目的的理想目的地。
content.en_text: With unique geological features, natural history and native plant and animal life, it is an ideal destination for recreation as well as research purposes.

content.cn_text: 该公园有一条令人叹为观止的瀑布，连接着该国最长的河流，但它以拥有世界上最大的亚热带雨林而闻名。
content.en_text: The park has a breathtaking waterfall connecting the longest river in the country, but it is most renowned for having the largest subtropical rainforest worldwide.

content.cn_text: 公园内有许多层的高，中，低植被随着季节的变化而生长。
content.en_text: There are many layers of tall, medium and low vegetation growing with seasonal variations in the park.

content.cn_text: 这是一个空气看起来绿色的地方。
content.en_text: It is a place where the air seems green.

content.cn_text: 热心的徒步旅行者可以在这里找到一系列很棒的选择。
content.en_text: Ardent hikers can find an awesome array of options here.

content.cn_text: 除了茂密的绿色雨林，游客还可以沿着山路徒步旅行。
content.en_text: Apart from the dense green rainforest, tourists can also hike along the mountain trail.

content.cn_text: 尽管景色令人惊叹，但不建议在上升的路上拍照。
content.en_text: Despite the stunning view, taking photos is not advised on the way up.

content.cn_text: 恐怕一个人可能会分心，陡峭的悬崖旁的狭窄小径非常危险。
content.en_text: I'm afraid as one might get distracted and the narrow trail by the sheer cliff is quite dangerous.

content.cn_text: 当您到达山顶时，没有什么比与家人在树下野餐更好的了。
content.en_text: When you reach the top of the mountain, there is nothing better than having a picnic under the trees with your family.

content.cn_text: 主要由野生动物步行者和骑自行车的人陪同。
content.en_text: Accompanied mostly by wildlife walkers as well as cyclists.

content.cn_text: 可能会发现灌木丛轨道是一个很好的选择，可以让自己度过一段宁静的时光。
content.en_text: may find the bush track a good choice for having a tranquil time to themselves.

content.cn_text: 作为您的导游，我建议只有专家徒步旅行者才能参加小溪赛道，因为它是穿越亚热带丛林的美丽而鼓舞人心的风景。
content.en_text: As your tour guide, I suggest that only expert hikers take the Creek circuit because it's beautiful and inspiring scenery through the subtropical jungle.

content.cn_text: 与其身体上的挑战并驾齐驱。
content.en_text: Is paralleled by its physical challenges.

content.cn_text: 公园内有交通工具清单。
content.en_text: A list of transport is available within the park.

content.cn_text: 自行车是一种受欢迎的选择，因为它是最灵活的出行方式。
content.en_text: Bicycles are a popular choice as it is the most flexible way to get around.

content.cn_text: 有轨电车因维修而暂时关闭。
content.en_text: Electric trams are temporarily closed for maintenance.

content.cn_text: 乘船下河是度过宁静下午的理想方式。
content.en_text: Boat trips down the river are an ideal way to spend a tranquil afternoon.

content.cn_text: 请放心，公园内的运输已包含在账单中。
content.en_text: Rest assured that transport within the park is covered in the bill.

content.cn_text: 极限运动是公园的另一个亮点。
content.en_text: Extreme sports is another highlight of the park.

content.cn_text: 有冒险的成年人，尤其是那些对拥有赛车心感到满意的人。
content.en_text: There are for adventurous grown ups, especially those who are comfortable with having a racing heart.

content.cn_text: 听起来很吓人。
content.en_text: Scary as it may sound.

content.cn_text: 在严格的指示和密切的监督下参加极限运动实际上是安全的。
content.en_text: It is actually safe to participate in extreme sports under strict instructions and close supervision.

content.cn_text: 无论天气如何，都可以进行速降运动。
content.en_text: Abseiling is available regardless of the weather.

content.cn_text: 这是一个有趣的方式来克服恐高症，获得新的技能，并得到一个肾上腺素。
content.en_text: It is a fun way to overcome fear of heights, gain new skills, and get an adrenaline rush.

content.cn_text: 除夏季外，还提供蹦极和滑翔伞。
content.en_text: Bungee jumping and paragliding are also available except for during the summer.

content.cn_text: 在这一点上，你可能会担心这里的饭菜。
content.en_text: At this point, you might worry about meals here.

content.cn_text: 好吧，尽管目前公园里只有一家餐厅，但菜肴的种类却令人惊讶。
content.en_text: Well, even though there is only one restaurant in the park at the moment, the variety of dishes is astonishing.

content.cn_text: 价格中包含两餐。
content.en_text: There are two meals included in the price.

content.cn_text: 用餐前在接待处拿到你的饭票。
content.en_text: Just get your meal ticket at the reception before dining.

content.cn_text: 此外，没有必要预订或担心可用性，因为有很多表。
content.en_text: Also, there is no need to make reservations or worry about availability, since there are plenty of tables.

content.cn_text: 在你听剩下的演讲之前，你有一些时间来看问题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions.

content.cn_text: 十七到二十。
content.en_text: seventeen to twenty.

content.cn_text: 现在听录音，回答问题，十七到二十。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions, seventeen to twenty.

content.cn_text: 在你逗留期间，这里。
content.en_text: During your stay here, here.

content.cn_text: 你可能想知道该怎么做。
content.en_text: You might want to know what there is to do.

content.cn_text: 让我们转到平面图，这样我就可以让你熟悉公园的布局。
content.en_text: Let's turn to the plan so I can familiarize you with the layout of the park.

content.cn_text: 大多数游客会选择住在我们位于东南角的招待所。
content.en_text: Most tourists would choose to stay in our guest house located in the southeast corner.

content.cn_text: 它拥有63间高雅的客房。
content.en_text: It features sixty three tastefully appointed guestrooms.

content.cn_text: 其中许多提供公园的壮观景色。
content.en_text: Many of which offer spectacular views of the park.

content.cn_text: 你会在我们的招待所找到一个远离家乡的家。
content.en_text: You'll find a home away, away from home at our guest house.

content.cn_text: 但是对于那些想近距离体验自然美景的人来说，这里还有一个露营地。
content.en_text: But for those who want to experience the natural beauty up close, there is also a campsite.

content.cn_text: 当你走出客房时，一直往前走。
content.en_text: When you get out of the guest house, go straight ahead.

content.cn_text: 在路的尽头向右转到你的左边。
content.en_text: Turn right at the end of the road to your left.

content.cn_text: 树木之间有一个露营地，您可以与猫头鹰和花栗鼠一起在星空下度过一个夜晚。
content.en_text: There is a campsite amongst the trees where you could spend a night under the stars together with owls and chipmunks.

content.cn_text: 如果你看一下计划的左上角，你会注意到一个野餐区。
content.en_text: If you look at the top left of the plan, you will notice a picnic area.

content.cn_text: 您可以自己带食物，也可以我们为您提供食物。
content.en_text: You can either bring your own food or we can deliver food to you.

content.cn_text: 烧烤是一种选择。
content.en_text: Barbecue is an option.

content.cn_text: 商务中心位于野餐区的正对面。
content.en_text: The business centre is situated directly opposite the picnic area.

content.cn_text: 它提供了灵活的，全面服务的办公室，会议套房，会议室，并配备了最新的多媒体设施。
content.en_text: It provides flexible, fully serviced offices, conferencing suites, meeting rooms and is equipped with the latest multimedia facilities.

content.cn_text: 有线和无线高速互联网在整个房屋内可用。
content.en_text: Wired as well as wireless high speed internet is available within the entire premises.

content.cn_text: 该中心旨在满足个人旅客和企业团体的需求。
content.en_text: The centre is designed to cater to both individual travellers and corporate groups.

content.cn_text: 游客也可以去博物馆，博物馆收藏着大量的藏品，展示了当地的历史和自然栖息地。
content.en_text: Visitors can also go to the museum, which holds a vast collection that exhibits local history and a natural habitat.

content.cn_text: 你从客房开始。
content.en_text: You start from the guest house.

content.cn_text: 在第一个连接处左转。
content.en_text: Just turn left at the first conjunction.

content.cn_text: 然后走过茶馆。
content.en_text: Then walk past the Tea House.

content.cn_text: 向右转.
content.en_text: Turn right.

content.cn_text: 你在第三个右边就能看到博物馆了。
content.en_text: You'll see the museum after making the third right.

content.cn_text: 你觉得这很容易，对吧？
content.en_text: Have you found it pretty easy, right?

content.cn_text: 要花一本书和一杯新鲜的咖啡度过一个愉快的下午，您可以从宾馆去公园里唯一的咖啡馆。
content.en_text: To spend a delightful afternoon with a book and a fresh cup of coffee, you can go to the only cafe in the park from the guest house.

content.cn_text: 你直走，然后在第二个方向右转，你会看到咖啡馆就在你面前。
content.en_text: You go straight, then take the second right, and you'll see the cafe right in front of you.

content.cn_text: 你可能想看看我们整个赛季的网球场。
content.en_text: You might want to check out our all season tennis court.

content.cn_text: 它为所有年龄和技能水平，水平提供指导。
content.en_text: Which offers instruction for all ages and skill levels, levels.

content.cn_text: 它位于咖啡馆对面。
content.en_text: It is located right opposite the cafe.

content.cn_text: 这是节的结尾。
content.en_text: That is the end of section.

groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: The most famous view in this park is

options.title: B
options.content: the longest river in the world.

options.title: C
options.content: the biggest sub-tropical rainforest in the world.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出公园"最著名的是拥有世界上最大的亚热带雨林"。题干中的"famous view"（著名景观）与听力中的"most renowned"（最著名）相对应。虽然原文也提到了令人惊叹的瀑布和国内最长的河流，但强调最著名的是亚热带雨林。此外，"worldwide"（全球范围）这个关键词明确表明雨林的规模是全球最大，而不仅限于国内，因此C选项是正确答案。

items.title: According to the tour guide, what is best to do on top of the mountain?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出"When you reach the top of the mountain, there is nothing better than having a picnic under the trees with your family"，这句话直接表明在山顶最好的活动就是野餐。"nothing better than"这个表达强调了野餐是最佳选择，完全符合题目要求的"what is best to do"。因此，选择A（having a picnic）是正确的。

items.title: What did the tour guide recommend for more experienced walkers?
items.analysis: 导游明确建议只有专业徒步者（expert hikers）才应该选择溪流环线（Creek Circuit）。这与题目中询问的"更有经验的步行者"（more experienced walkers）相匹配。导游还提到这条路线有体力挑战，暗示它适合更有经验的徒步者。因此，Creek Circuit是正确答案。

items.title: What is mentioned about the transport in the park?

options.title: C
options.content: It is included in the bill.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出公园内的交通费用已包含在账单中。这直接对应了选项C "It is included in the bill"。原文使用了"covered in the bill"这一表达，与选项中的"included in the bill"在意思上完全一致，因此C是正确答案。

items.title: Which activity is provided for adults all year round?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出绳降运动（abseiling）"regardless of the weather"（不受天气影响），这个表述等同于题目中的"all year round"（全年）。相比之下，蹦极跳和滑翔伞在夏季不可用。因此，只有绳降运动是全年都提供的活动，符合题目要求。

items.title: What should the visitors do before they go to the restaurant?

options.title: C
options.content: collect the meal ticket at the reception

items.analysis: 文中明确指出在用餐前需要在前台领取就餐券。这个信息直接回答了题目中问到的"游客在去餐厅前应该做什么"。而且，原文中提到不需要预订或担心餐位的可用性，这进一步排除了其他选项的可能性。因此，正确答案是在前台领取就餐券。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
Label the plan below.
Write the correct letter, A-I, next to Questions 17-20.

items.title: Campsite
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确提到“picnic area”在地图的左上角（top left of the plan），而E位置正好符合这个描述。通过定位词“picnic”和信号词“top left of the plan”，可以准确找到答案。

items.title: Business Centre
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确指出“Business Centre”在“picnic area”的正对面，而图中A的位置正好符合这个描述，所以答案是A。

items.title: Museum
items.analysis: 正确答案是G，因为听力原文明确指示了从Guesthouse出发，直走然后第二个右转就是咖啡馆。根据地图，从Guesthouse出发，直走，第二个右转的位置是G，因此答案是G。

items.title: Cafe
items.analysis: 原文提到“网球场位于咖啡馆的正对面”，并且图中D位置在咖啡馆的正对面，因此第20题答案是D。
